# SEC_KEYCHAIN_SETTINGS_VERS1

**Global Variable**

Defines the keychain settings version.

## Declaration

```swift
var SEC_KEYCHAIN_SETTINGS_VERS1: Int32 { get }
```

## Discussion

This value is used in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings/version] parameter of a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings] structure.
title: SEC_KEYCHAIN_SETTINGS_VERS1
